privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains what information Cosous collects, how we use it, and the choices you have. By using Cosous you agree to the practices described below.

sections.body: We collect your email address solely for the purpose of authentication and account security via Supabase. We also store the content you create in the app — such as imported recipes, grocery lists, and meal plans — so it can sync across your devices. We do not sell your data to third parties.

• To verify your identity and keep you signed in.
  • To protect your account from unauthorized access.
  • To sync and back up your recipes, lists, and meal plans across devices.
  • To send essential service-related emails (like password resets).
Your credentials are encrypted and managed by Supabase, a secure industry-standard authentication provider. Your content is stored securely and is available to you offline.
You may request to delete your account and all associated data at any time through the app settings or by contacting support@cosous.app.
If you have any questions about this policy, reach out at support@cosous.app.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By downloading or using Cosous, you agree to the following terms. Please read them carefully.

sections.body: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials and for all activities that occur under your account.

You agree not to use the service for any illegal activities, to transmit viruses or malicious code, or to attempt to breach the security of the application. Recipes and content you import remain your responsibility to use in line with the rights of their original creators.
Premium features are offered through paid subscriptions billed by the App Store or Google Play. You can manage, upgrade, or cancel your subscription at any time through your store account.
We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms or engage in fraudulent activity.
The service is provided "as is." We are not liable for any damages resulting from the use or inability to use the service.
Questions about these terms? Reach out at support@cosous.app.
